positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial map featuring a majestic, stylized mountain range silhouette combined with mystical bioluminescent flora and fauna. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, suitable for a square apparel print. Include floating geometric constellations, abstract planetary rings, and glowing stylized woodland creatures (e.g., foxes, owls, deer) integrated seamlessly into the landscape. Use a deep midnight blue and indigo background, contrasted sharply with vibrant gradients of emerald green, gold leaf accents, and luminous lavender highlights. The aesthetic should combine Art Deco illustration with scientific botanical etching, ensuring crisp lines and strong visual contrast. High detail, perfect symmetry, vector art style, deep depth of field.
negative: blurry, grainy, sketch, low resolution, cropped, watermark, text, signature, logo, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformities, messy, noisy, realistic photo, photorealism
